top_signals.title: US Stock Futures Drop as New AI Model Draws DeepSeek Comparisons
top_signals.summary: US stock-index futures dropped on Friday as the selloff in semiconductor names gathered steam following the reveal of an artificial-intelligence model from a Chinese startup.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Coronation Trims TSMC, SK Hynix on AI Hype, Boosts India Stocks
top_signals.summary: Coronation Asset Management Ltd., which oversees $47 billion, has trimmed its exposure to chipmakers and increased its allocation to India, as expectations for artificial intelligence stocks have risen to levels that are nearly impossible to beat.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Innolight Gets Approval for Up to $8 Billion Hong Kong Listing
top_signals.summary: Zhongji Innolight Co. received approval from China’s securities regulator and the Hong Kong stock exchange for what is likely to be one of the city’s biggest listings in years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Agencies issue joint statement on handling of highly sensitive information during bank examinations
top_signals.summary: Agencies issue joint statement on handling of highly sensitive information during bank examinations
